item.title: Frontier Exploration - API and External Service Dependencies
item.description: Frontier Exploration - API and External Service Dependencies The Gap The Seed covers: Software version dependencies — which software version knowledge applies to (version:, eol-estimate) Physical equipment dependencies — what tools are required to execute knowledge But it does NOT cover: External se...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Climate-Zone-Dependent Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Climate-Zone-Dependent Knowledge The Gap The Seed includes rules for jurisdiction-dependent knowledge (legal, medical, financial knowledge that varies by country/region) and general temporal knowledge (knowledge that changes over time).

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Probabilistic Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Probabilistic Knowledge How do we handle knowledge that is true “most of the time” but has exceptions? The Problem The Seed has confidence markers (high/emerging/disputed/obsolete), but these don’t capture inherent probabilistic knowledge - knowledge that is legitimately uncert...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Sensory Knowledge Capture
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Sensory Knowledge Capture How do you capture knowledge about taste, smell, texture, and other sensory experiences in a knowledge base? The Problem Some knowledge domains are fundamentally sensory: Cooking — taste, texture, aroma, mouthfeel Wine/coffee — flavor profiles, aroma c...

item.title: Frontier Exploration - Temporal and Sequential Knowledge
item.description: Frontier Exploration: Temporal and Sequential Knowledge How do we handle knowledge where the sequence itself is the core knowledge? The Problem The Seed covers: Static knowledge: Facts, concepts, definitions (true at any point in time) Procedural knowledge: How-to steps, recipes, code (action-orient...

item.title: Graph Traversal Efficiency
item.description: Graph Traversal Efficiency The agent must be able to quickly navigate from any note to find requested information.

item.title: Note Lifecycle Management
item.description: Note Lifecycle Management Notes have a lifecycle. Knowing when to archive or delete is as important as knowing when to create.

item.title: Seed Stress Test - Cooking Knowledge Base
item.description: Seed Stress Test: Cooking Knowledge Base Testing all Seed rules in the cooking domain reveals where general rules break down for culinary knowledge.

item.title: Stress Test - Probabilistic Knowledge Rule Across Domains
item.description: Stress Test: Probabilistic Knowledge Rule Across Domains Testing the Seed’s probabilistic knowledge rule across multiple domains to identify edge cases and refinements.

item.title: Stress Test - Self-Contained Notes Rule Across Domains
item.description: Stress Test: Self-Contained Notes Rule Across Domains Testing Seed rule: “Every note must be self-contained — readable without clicking any links.” This note consolidates stress tests from multiple domains (Legal, Music Composition) to provide a comprehensive view of the Self-Contained Notes rule’s ...
